taxonomy: Pollinirhiza ovata is classified as a species within the genus Pollinirhiza and the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. uses: Pollinirhiza ovata, also known as the orchid tree, has been found to possess various medicinal properties.
